app.sequenceOverflowMessage: Sequence number is exhausted. Please clean up the folder and try again.

errors.unresolved: Couldn't read a local folder from that drop.
errors.preloadFailed: FlowSelect couldn't inspect that dropped folder.
errors.notDirectory: Dropped item is not a folder.
errors.notFound: Dropped folder could not be found.
errors.statFailed: FlowSelect couldn't access the dropped folder.
errors.saveFailed: Failed to set the export folder.

queue.label: Queue
queue.title: Task queue
queue.sourceQueuedForTranscode: Source media ready, added to transcode queue

runtime.manualHint: Click to retry. You can also review runtime recovery in Settings.

language.title: Language
language.hint: Apply to the main window, settings, and context menu immediately.

appUpdates.title: Receive test builds
appUpdates.hint: Enable beta / rc prerelease updates. Leave off to stay on stable releases only.

shortcut.title: Global Shortcut
shortcut.hint: Use one shortcut to open FlowSelect from anywhere.

launchAtStartup.title: Launch at startup
launchAtStartup.hint: Open FlowSelect automatically when you sign in.

rename.title: Rename downloaded media
rename.hint: Apply a naming rule to new downloads instead of keeping the source name.

aePortal.title: After Effects auto-import
aePortal.hint: Open finished media in After Effects after download.

pluginsPage.intro: Manage the integrations that extend your FlowSelect workflow. New plugin entries will appear here as the system grows.

installed.title: Installed now
installed.hint: Current integrations available in this build.

future.title: More integrations
future.hint: This list is ready for the next plugin entries.
future.body: Future download, workflow, or export integrations will appear in the same list structure once they are available.

galleryDl.description: Image and gallery downloader used for Pinterest-first flows.

runtime.mainWindowRetryHint: The main-window runtime indicator can also retry failed setup.
runtime.markedBlockedByUser: Marked as blocked by user choice

supportLog.title: Support
supportLog.hint: Export a diagnostic log and open its folder for troubleshooting.
supportLog.exportReady: Tap once more to export a diagnostic log

status.idle: Current build shown here. Check for updates when needed.
status.upToDate: You're already on the latest version.

uiLab.developerSectionHint: Open UI Lab to preview runtime, download, and transcode states without real workflows.

injectionDebug.title: Extension Injection Debug
injectionDebug.hint: Enable control-bar injection outlines and layout diagnostics inside supported site detectors.

uiLab.title: UI Lab
uiLab.subtitle: Dev-only state presets for reviewing the real main-window UI without running actual downloads or transcodes.

runtime.title: Runtime
runtime.hint: Preview automatic dependency bootstrap states and failure recovery.

download.title: Download
download.hint: Drive the main window's active download and queue surfaces without a real network transfer.

transcode.title: Transcode
transcode.hint: Preview transcode progress and failure handling without invoking FFmpeg.

mixed.title: Mixed
mixed.hint: Stress the compact shell with concurrent download and transcode activity.

runtimeAutoConfig.label: Auto Config
runtimeAutoConfig.description: Shows the runtime indicator in automatic download mode with hoverable progress.

runtimeFailed.label: Failed
runtimeFailed.description: Shows the retryable failure state for the runtime reminder.

downloadActive.label: Active
downloadActive.description: Single active download with live progress, speed, and ETA.

downloadQueued.label: Queued
downloadQueued.description: One active download plus two pending tasks for queue review.

transcodeActive.label: Active
transcodeActive.description: Active transcode with a pending follow-up task.

transcodeFailed.label: Failed
transcodeFailed.description: Failure card, error text, and transcode failure notice state.

mixedBusy.label: Mixed Busy
mixedBusy.description: Download merging plus transcode finalization at the same time.
